name: Alternate Data Stream Created using Findstr
description: Detects the use of `findstr.exe` to create an Alternate Data Stream (ADS). `findstr` is typically used to search for strings in files, but adversaries can exploit it to create ADSs for defense evasion.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Windows Security Event ID (either 4688 for Process Creation or 4663 for File System Access).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that was executed, which should be 'findstr.exe'.

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the findstr.exe executable.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute findstr.exe.

parameters.name: object_name
parameters.description: The name of the object (file) where the ADS was created.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account associated with the event.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
